summary: M441 — FTL hex/staggered grid: every other column shifted down 50% so adjacent-column nodes never share visual y. All edges are diagonal — zero horizontal/vertical connections (verified: 196 total edges, 0 flat). Each from-node connects to its closest up-right + down-right diagonal in the next column → ≥2 forward paths per node (cap 1 only when next column has 1 node, e.g. into the boss). 1-node columns reach both diagonals of the next column for true 2-path branching. Dungeons + hidden bosses placed on the alternate (col+0.5, vy±0.5) grid so they sit between two trunk rows and never overlap a trunk edge. Boss forced to be the LAST entry in z.nodes so the forward cross-zone arrow only lights up on the boss node (was firing on whatever node ended up at array tail).
